title: CEFR A1 Level Evaluation Test - English
description: Comprehensive A1 (CEFR) level evaluation test covering listening, reading, visual comprehension, grammar, and vocabulary skills.

sections.instructions: Listen to the audio clips and answer the questions. You can play each audio twice.

questions.transcription: In nineteen thirty-three you and I knew that we must never let our economic system get completely out of joint again
questions.transcription_raw: In 1933 you and I knew that we must never let our economic system get completely out of joint again
questions.instruction: Listen to the audio and complete the missing word(s).
questions.question: In nineteen thirty-three you and I knew that we must never let our economic system get completely ________ again.

questions.transcription: It was read for the first time in March eighteen sixty-six, but did not become law till eighteen sixty-eight.
questions.transcription_raw: It was read for the first time in March 1866, but did not become law till 1868.
questions.instruction: Listen to the audio and choose the correct answer.
questions.question: How many years passed between when it was first read and when it became law?

options.text: One year
Two years
Three years
Four years

questions.transcription: Its outer part, about twelve feet in width, was protected with towers at intervals of sixty-five feet.
questions.transcription_raw: Its outer part, about twelve feet in width, was protected with towers at intervals of sixty-five feet.
questions.instruction: Listen to the audio and complete the missing words.
questions.question: Its outer part, about ________ feet in width, was protected with towers at intervals of ________ feet.

questions.transcription: I am reminded of that evening in March, four years ago, when I made my first radio report to you.
questions.transcription_raw: I am reminded of that evening in March, four years ago, when I made my first radio report to you.
questions.instruction: Listen to the audio and choose the correct answer.
questions.question: When did the speaker make his first radio report?

options.text: Last year
Two years ago
Four years ago
Five years ago

questions.transcription: It helped him in his job here, he was able to come back here with a fresh view of many things.
questions.transcription_raw: It helped him in his job here, he was able to come back here with a fresh view of many things.
questions.instruction: Listen to the audio and decide if the statement is true or false.
questions.statement: The person returned to his job with new ideas about many things.

sections.instructions: Read the texts carefully and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: I am at the post office with my uncle. I have a white envelope in my hand. Then I put it on a desk. I talk to a woman. When I turn, the envelope is not there. I look behind a chair and near the door. A man says, "Is this your envelope?" I say, "Yes! Thank you very much."
questions.instruction: Read the text. Then choose the correct answer.
questions.question: What happens to the boy's envelope?

options.text: He puts it in his pocket and forgets it.
He loses it, then a man finds it and gives it back.
He gives it to a woman at the desk.
He leaves it behind the door.

questions.text: It is Tuesday morning. My mother says, "A box comes today." I sit near the window. I look at the street. I see a big truck. The driver stops in front of our house. He has a brown box. He knocks on the door. I open it. I take the box. It is heavy. Inside, there is a new blue clock.
questions.instruction: Read the text. Then choose the correct answer.
questions.question: Why does the narrator sit near the window?

options.text: Because the box is heavy.
Because he wants to see the truck arrive.
Because he likes looking at the street.
Because his mother tells him to open the door.

questions.text:
Sophie : "Hello, Paul! Where are you?"
Paul : "I am at the bank with my father."
Sophie : "Oh. I am at the park. There is a dog and two babies here."
Paul : "OK. I come in ten minutes."
Sophie : "Perfect! Bring water, please. It is hot."
Paul : "Yes. Bye!"
questions.instruction: Read the dialogue. Then decide if the statement is TRUE or FALSE.
questions.statement: Paul agrees to meet Sophie at the park and bring her water.

sections.instructions: Look at the images and answer the questions about what you see.

questions.question: The woman is brushing her teeth.
The mother and daughter are _______ a meal together in the kitchen.
Where are these people and what are they doing?

options.text: They are at a restaurant ordering food
They are at home having a family meal
They are at work in a meeting
They are at the cinema watching a movie

questions.question: The student is reading a history book.
The woman is working on her _______ at the kitchen table.

sections.instructions: Choose the correct form of the verb to complete each sentence.

questions.question: She ___ to swim when it is hot.
There ___ a race next week.
questions.explanation: Future simple with will + base verb

questions.question: The bridesmaids ___ beautiful dresses at the wedding last Saturday.
questions.explanation: Past simple of irregular verb wear → wore

sections.instructions: Choose the correct word to complete each sentence.

questions.question: The weather is ___ today. Let's stay inside.
questions.explanation: Adjectif décrivant un temps très mauvais

questions.question: Every year, many ___ travel to Paris to visit its famous sights.
questions.explanation: Nom désignant les personnes qui visitent un lieu
